properties.description: Data collection rule for SailPoint IdentityNow events

dataFlows.transformKql: source | extend TimeGenerated = now() | extend Org = tostring(org) | extend Pod = tostring(pod) | extend Created = todatetime(created) | extend EventId = tostring(id) | extend Action = tostring(action) | extend EventType = tostring(type) | extend IpAddress = tostring(ipAddress) | extend Operation = tostring(operation) | extend Status = tostring(status) | extend TechnicalName = tostring(technicalName) | extend EventName = tostring(name) | extend Synced = todatetime(synced) | extend RecordType = tostring(_type) | extend Actor = parse_json(tostring(actor)) | extend Target = parse_json(tostring(target)) | extend Attributes = parse_json(tostring(attributes)) | extend Objects = parse_json(tostring(objects)) | project TimeGenerated, Org, Pod, Created, EventId, Action, EventType, IpAddress, Operation, Status, TechnicalName, EventName, Synced, RecordType, Actor, Target, Attributes, Objects
